examples: She was off again, to Kenya.
The first leg of the journey was by boat to Lake Naivasha in Kenya.
Elephants were often to be found in swamp in eastern Kenya around the Tana River.
Wambugu won the World Bank award for global development in 2000 after introducing the tissue-culture banana to Kenya.
Peace talks between Kenya's president and the opposition over the disputed election are dragging on without any resolution.
